runtimeTarget.containerAlias: optional evidence-only; never used for target selection
runtimeTarget.publishedPortMustMatch: exactly one binding compatible with the selected numeric loopback address family and exact port; a valid IPv4/IPv6 dual-stack pair is allowed; revalidated from post-lock immutable identity

frontendEntry.measurementIsolation: Each selected dataset mode validates a fresh warmup JWT against warmup duration plus approved safety before DB/API context, then refreshes and validates a measured JWT immediately before the pure DB counter snapshot. Measured k6 setup performs no HTTP, and only dashboard summary is measured.

adoptionGate.requiredLatencyStatistics: finite non-negative p50 <= p95 <= p99 <= max
adoptionGate.dbWindow: strict database/table/observer-session-planner schema; required sets exact; precision-safe decimal counter deltas; stable stats_reset/analyze/autoanalyze/vacuum/autovacuum/observer planner; boundary snapshots contain no external activity
adoptionGate.dockerResources: before/after exact mode, boundary, app/postgres/redis full container ID and name; CPU finite non-negative with multi-core values above 100 allowed; RAM safe finite non-negative, positive limit, used <= limit, 0 <= percent <= 100; boundary snapshots only, never continuous or peak
adoptionGate.externalActivityAdoption: non-adoptable until user-approved continuous provenance or isolation exists

correctness: UNPAID PENALTY/COFFEE amount and member totals
OPEN and recently CLOSED poll counts
per-OPEN-poll response counts and aggregate missing count
same-campus data only and other-campus denial
evidence: validated before/after Docker CPU and RAM boundary snapshots with exact runtime identity and mode binding (not continuous or peak)
pure pre/post pg_stat_database and pg_stat_user_tables counter snapshots with observer-overhead interpretation metadata
machine-readable DB correctness with exact per-OPEN-poll response counts
observer psql session planner settings and context (not measured app-session planner proof)
operator external activity declaration and boundary-only pg_stat_activity snapshots (not complete provenance)
matching actual Compose project/service labels and a shared Compose-project runner lock
initial/mode-before/mode-after immutable container/name and PostgreSQL postmaster continuity evidence
